name: Formal Demand Letter / Legal Notice
description: A formal letter used to officially demand action, payment, or cease-and-desist from another party prior to legal action.
content:
Sent Via {{delivery_method}}

FROM:
Name / Company: {{sender_name_title}}
Address: {{sender_address}}
{{#if sender_counsel}}Legal Counsel: {{sender_counsel}}{{/if}}

Date: {{formatDate letter_date}}

TO:
Name / Company: {{recipient_name_title}}
Address: {{recipient_address}}

RE: FORMAL DEMAND NOTICE - {{subject}}

Dear {{recipient_name_title}},

This letter serves as a formal demand regarding the aforementioned subject matter. Please consider this correspondence an official notice intended to resolve the issue before pursuing formal legal proceedings.

BACKGROUND AND FACTS:

{{explanations_facts}}

DEMANDS AND REQUIRED ACTION:

Based on the foregoing, we hereby demand that you take the following action(s) immediately:

{{demand_and_conclusion}}

If you fail to comply with these demands by {{formatDate deadline_date}}, we will have no alternative but to pursue all available legal remedies to protect our rights and interests. This may include initiating a lawsuit against you, in which case we will also seek to hold you liable for all court costs, legal fees, and accrued interest.

We strongly urge you to treat this matter with the seriousness it warrants and respond accordingly within the stipulated timeframe.

Govern yourself accordingly.

Sincerely,

{{sender_name_title}}
{{#if sender_counsel}}Represented by: {{sender_counsel}}
{{/if}}
Signature: _________________________

fields.name: delivery_method
fields.label: Method of Delivery
fields.placeholder: e.g., Certified Mail, Return Receipt Requested

fields.name: subject
fields.label: Subject / Reference
fields.placeholder: e.g., Breach of Contract, Outstanding Debt of $5000

fields.name: explanations_facts
fields.label: Background and Facts
fields.placeholder: Explain the situation, dates, and reasons for this notice clearly.

fields.name: demand_and_conclusion
fields.label: Demands / Required Action
fields.placeholder: State exactly what the recipient must do (e.g., pay $5000, stop an action).
